# Reyna Pay

Reyna Pay LLC is a payments infrastructure company. Our flagship product is SalonTransact, a vertical-specific payment processing platform built for salons. Reyna Pay also operates a partner program where independent operators can launch branded merchant services businesses powered by our infrastructure.

## Products

- **SalonTransact** (https://reynapay.com/salontransact): Salon-first payment processing — card-on-file, stylist commission attribution, booking integration, transparent fees.
- **Partner Program** (https://reynapay.com/partners): Branded reseller program for entrepreneurs entering the merchant services industry.
- **Reyna Pay Infrastructure**: PCI-compliant, card-network-certified processing platform underlying both products.

## Founder

Robert Reyna, CEO of Salon Envy® (multi-location salon franchise) and serial operator across real estate, contracting, and software.

## Contact

- General: support@reynapay.com

- Blog: https://reynapay.com/blog
